# The Coast

> The Coast is a brand design studio that makes professional branding affordable and accessible for small businesses, entrepreneurs, startups, and artists. Founded by David Coast, we turn visions into empires — crafting custom branding solutions that make small businesses look and feel like they belong in the big leagues.

## About

- [About The Coast](https://coastglobal.org/about): Learn about our story, mission, and vision. Founded by David Coast, The Coast was built to level the playing field — giving small businesses, startups, and solo entrepreneurs the branding power that makes people stop, look, and remember.
- [Vision 2026](https://coastglobal.org/vision): Conceptual architectural renderings of our future Coast HQ — embodying innovation, coastal serenity, and the bold pursuit of excellence.

## Services

- [Services](https://coastglobal.org/services): From identity design to complete brand transformations — everything you need to stand out. A la carte creative services for businesses of all sizes.
  - [Logo Design](https://coastglobal.org/services): Custom logo with 3 concepts and 2 revision rounds.
  - [Flyers](https://coastglobal.org/services): Print-ready promotional designs for digital and print.
  - [EPK / Press Kit](https://coastglobal.org/services): Professional media kit for press and partners.
  - [Social Graphics](https://coastglobal.org/services): 5–10 branded templates for social platforms.
  - [Full Rebrand](https://coastglobal.org/services): Complete brand transformation package.
  - [Brand Identity Guidelines](https://coastglobal.org/services): Logo, colors, typography, and comprehensive brand guidelines.
  - [Website Design](https://coastglobal.org/services): Custom website design and development.
  - [Pitch Deck / Investor Materials](https://coastglobal.org/services): Investor-ready presentation design.
  - [Video & Motion](https://coastglobal.org/services): Promotional videos and animations.
  - [Digital Marketing](https://coastglobal.org/services): SEO, ads setup, and email campaigns.
  - [Social Media Management](https://coastglobal.org/services): Content creation, scheduling, and management.

## Service Categories

- [Brand Identity](https://coastglobal.org/services): Custom branding and logo design — your visual identity, refined and unforgettable. From mood boards to comprehensive brand guidelines, we engineer identities that demand attention.
- [Digital Experience](https://coastglobal.org/services): Websites, apps, and digital products designed for impact, usability, and conversion. We blend cutting-edge technology with uncompromising aesthetics.
- [Creative Strategy](https://coastglobal.org/services): Data-driven insights combined with bold creativity to position your brand as a market leader.
- [Marketing Assets](https://coastglobal.org/services): Flyers, social graphics, pitch decks, and digital assets that convert — campaigns that capture attention and drive measurable results.

## Pricing

- [Pricing](https://coastglobal.org/pricing): Monthly retainer packages designed to keep your brand sharp, consistent, and always evolving.
  - [Creator Plan](https://coastglobal.org/pricing): Free tier for freelance designers and creative beginners. Up to 5 design projects, basic brand kit tools, community feedback access, starter UI components.
  - [Studio Plan](https://coastglobal.org/pricing): $50/month for agencies and growing creative teams. Unlimited design projects, complete brand management, advanced UI component library, Figma and Adobe integration, team collaboration workspace.
  - [Agency Pro Plan](https://coastglobal.org/pricing): $500/month for large design teams. Everything in Studio plus dedicated creative strategist, white-label design system, custom component development, SSO and enterprise security, 24/7 premium support.

## Process

- [How We Build Empires](https://coastglobal.org/#process): Our four-step process for transforming your brand.
  - Discover: We dive deep into your brand's DNA — story, audience, competitors, and aspirations. Understanding your vision is where empires begin.
  - Design: From mood boards to final concepts — every color, typeface, and element chosen with purpose. Crafting your identity with precision.
  - Develop: Designs become real-world assets — websites, social templates, print materials. Pixel-perfect and built for impact.
  - Launch: Your brand goes live. Pixel-perfect, with guidelines for sustained growth. Your empire, released into the world.

## Portfolio & Work

- [Our Work](https://coastglobal.org/work): Brand transformations, creative projects, and the stories behind them.
- [Client Showcase](https://coastglobal.org/portfolio): The brands we've helped build, grow, and transform.
- Featured Projects:
  - AMG Records — Logo Design, Brand Identity (2026)
  - Zapped Co — Visual Identity, Strategy (2025)
  - OgaTicket — Web Design, UX/UI (2026)

## Blog

- [The Journal](https://coastglobal.org/blog): Insights on brand design, visual identity, and creative strategy. Articles and thought leadership from The Coast team.

## Get Started

- [Get Started](https://coastglobal.org/get-started): Begin your branding journey with a quick 3-step pre-intake form. Tell us about yourself, select the services you need, and share your budget range.
- [Project Intake](https://coastglobal.org/intake): Detailed 5-step project intake form covering your business, services needed, brand vision (vibes, colors, inspiration), and practical details like budget and timeline.

## Client Portal

- [Client Portal](https://coastglobal.org/portal): Login-protected portal for existing clients to view projects, access files, submit requests, and read project updates.

## FAQ

- What is your typical project timeline? 2 to 6 weeks depending on scope. We believe in moving fast without compromising on quality.
- Do you work with startups or established businesses? Both. We partner with entrepreneurs, solo founders, small businesses, and growing companies ready to level up their brand presence.
- What is your pricing structure? We price based on value and scope, not hourly rates. Every project is unique, and we construct custom proposals after a discovery session. We also offer monthly retainer packages.
- Do you offer ongoing support after launch? Yes. We view our client relationships as long-term partnerships. We offer retainer agreements for continuous design, development, and strategic support.

## Company Stats

- 50+ Projects Delivered
- 30+ Brands Built
- 98% Client Satisfaction

## Industries Served

Healthcare, E-commerce, Tech/SaaS, Food & Beverage, Fashion, Real Estate, Professional Services, Entertainment, Music

## Clients

AMG Records, Zapped Co, OgaTicket, Coast Global, Brand Builders, Empire Studios, Vision Labs, Nova Creative
